zh.lifeSummary: 當Aschetil de Ridell於1116年出生在法國阿奎泰吉洛德布萊也-吉賽特-盧斯時，他的父親Philip de Ridell38歲，母親Christiana de Soulis38歲。他與Elena de Morville結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1180年在英國蘇格蘭洛包爾奧可南享年64歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ridell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Swedish: ornamental name composed of the element Wid- (see Widman ) + the suffix -ell, a derivative of the Latin adjectival ending -elius.

variants.name: Widman
meanings: Swedish: ornamental name composed of the element wid- (possibly from Old Swedish vithr ‘wood, forest’, or from a placename formed with Old Swedish vīd ‘wide’) + man ‘man’, or a habitational name for someone from a place called with the element wid-.
Americanized form of South German   Widmann  .

en.lifeSummary: When Aschetil de Ridell was born in 1116, in Blaye-et-Sainte-Luce, Gironde, Aquitaine, France, his father, Philip de Ridell, was 38 and his mother, Christiana de Soulis, was 38. He married Elena de Morville. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1180, in Oxnam, Roxburghshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aschetil de Ridell est né en 1116, à Blaye-et-Sainte-Luce, Gironde, Aquitaine, France, son père, Philip de Ridell, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Christiana de Soulis, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Elena de Morville. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1180, à Oxnam, Roxburghshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aschetil de Ridell 1116 in Blaye-et-Sainte-Luce, Gironde, Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Philip de Ridell 38 und seine Mutter Christiana de Soulis 38. Er hat Elena de Morville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1180 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Oxnam, Roxburghshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aschetil de Ridell è nato il nel 1116 nel Blaye-et-Sainte-Luce, Gironde, Aquitaine, Francia, il suo padre, Philip de Ridell, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Christiana de Soulis, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Elena de Morville. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1180, nel Oxnam, Roxburghshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Aschetil de Ridellが1116年にフランスアクイティアインギロンドブレイエ-エト-サインテ-ルスで生まれた時，父Philip de Ridellは38歳，母Christiana de Soulisは38歳であった。Elena de Morvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1180年にイギリススコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアオクスナムで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Aschetil de Ridell(이)가 1116년 프랑스 아키테인 지론드 블레이-트-세인테-루스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Philip de Ridell(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Christiana de Soulis(은)는 38세였다. 그는 Elena de Morville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1180년 영국 스코틀랜드 록스버그h실르 스남에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aschetil de Ridell nasceu em 1116, em Blaye-et-Sainte-Luce, Gironde, Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Philip de Ridell, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Christiana de Soulis, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Elena de Morville. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1180, em Oxnam, Roxburghshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aschetil de Ridell родился в 1116 г. в местности блеие-ет-сеинте-лус, гиронд, аквитеин, Франция, его отцу по имени Philip de Ridell было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Christiana de Soulis, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Elena de Morville. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1180 г. в местности окснам, роксбургшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aschetil de Ridell nació en 1116, en Blaye-et-Sainte-Luce, Gironde, Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Philip de Ridell, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Christiana de Soulis, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Elena de Morville. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1180, en Oxnam, Roxburghshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años.
